title: 東京大賞典の後に・トップ→トップ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten draws to a close, and the
winning concert is an incredible event that
attendees will never forget.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite that, Smart Falcon confesses to feeling
frustrated that it didn't draw fervor on par with
that of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unaware of the brilliance of G1 turf races, the
other dirt runners are content with how things are.
Smart Falcon realizes she needs to lift everyone
up with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race goal is the February Stakes. Smart
Falcon appears strained, so I ask her to avoid
pushing herself too hard.
